ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Venue or location where the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Track and Field) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for team and athlete registration */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the team is registered in */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was formed */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the athlete in the team */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the athlete (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the score */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the score */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the team (formatted as MM:SS.SS) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the team based on their performance */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., Time, Distance, Points) */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the score */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the score has been verified by officials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of coaching certifications */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Track and Field) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations for the event type */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used for the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that achieved the result */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place achieved by the team in the event */,
  "overall_score" INTEGER /* Overall score of the team based on performance */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the result */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the result has been verified by officials */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards or accolades received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being scheduled */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event is scheduled to start */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete being reported on */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the performance */,
  "performance_time" TEXT /* Time recorded for the athlete's performance */,
  "performance_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded based on individual performance */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of performance (e.g., Time, Distance, Points) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the performance has been verified by officials */,
  "coach_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the coach on the athlete's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event attended */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete attending the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time of attendance */,
  "late_status" INTEGER /* Whether the athlete was late */,
  "reason_for_absence" TEXT /* Reason for absence if the athlete was absent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Coach, Athlete) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level for the role (e.g., 1 for basic, 10 for admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Suggestion) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
